title: An Old Workman
content:
Warped... gland-dry...
    With spine askew
    And body shrunken into half its space...
    Well-used as some cracked paving-stone...
    Bearing on his grimed and pitted front
    A stamp... as of innumerable feet.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Lola Ridge delivers a powerful performance in "An Old Workman"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
